script.openingLine: A round-of-32 meeting awaits as Argentina face Cabo Verde at Miami Stadium.

moments.spokenLine: Argentina and Cabo Verde begin their round-of-32 meeting at Miami Stadium.
moments.explainer: The replay opens with both teams level and the knockout contest under way.
Argentina take the lead through Lionel MESSI, creating the match’s first decisive swing.

moments.spokenLine: Argentina reach half-time ahead of Cabo Verde, 1–0.
moments.explainer: The interval arrives with Argentina holding the advantage.

moments.spokenLine: DEROY DUARTE brings Cabo Verde level, 1–1.
moments.explainer: Cabo Verde answer Argentina’s lead, restoring parity.

moments.spokenLine: KEVIN PINA is shown a card for Cabo Verde.
moments.explainer: The contest continues with a disciplinary moment for Cabo Verde.

moments.spokenLine: Lisandro MARTINEZ puts Argentina back in front, 2–1.
moments.explainer: Argentina regain the lead, moving ahead again after Cabo Verde’s equaliser.

moments.spokenLine: SIDNY LOPES CABRAL levels it for Cabo Verde, 2–2.
moments.explainer: Cabo Verde respond once more, leaving the score level again.
Argentina move in front for the third time, taking the decisive advantage.

moments.spokenLine: Gonzalo MONTIEL is shown a card for Argentina.
moments.explainer: A disciplinary moment arrives for Argentina late in the contest.

moments.spokenLine: Argentina finish the match ahead of Cabo Verde, 3–2.
moments.explainer: The final score confirms Argentina’s victory after the lead changed hands repeatedly.

chapters.text: At kick-off, Argentina and Cabo Verde begin their round-of-32 meeting at Miami Stadium.
In the 29th minute, Lionel MESSI puts Argentina ahead, 1–0.
At half-time, Argentina reach half-time ahead of Cabo Verde, 1–0.
In the 59th minute, DEROY DUARTE brings Cabo Verde level, 1–1.
In the 68th minute, KEVIN PINA is shown a card for Cabo Verde.
In the 92nd minute, Lisandro MARTINEZ puts Argentina back in front, 2–1.
In the 103rd minute, SIDNY LOPES CABRAL levels it for Cabo Verde, 2–2.
In the 111th minute, Player 409241 restores Argentina’s lead, 3–2.
In the 115th minute, Gonzalo MONTIEL is shown a card for Argentina.
At full-time, Argentina finish the match ahead of Cabo Verde, 3–2.
